column1: # Pisces Moon OS — Pisces Moon P4 partition table
# Target hardware: ELECROW CrowPanel Advanced 7inch ESP32-P4 (16MB flash)
# Provisional layout — will be revisited once app sizes are known.
# Carries over the S3 philosophy: one big factory app
# device flash (OTA happens via SDIO to the C6
# - app0 trimmed to 6MB (P4 binaries are larger but compressed differently;
#     - C6 Ghost Engine firmware blob (for SDIO OTA
#     - Doom WAD / SimCity terrain (if loaded internally vs SD)
# - nvs (24KB) for system NVS namespace use.
# (fits in 16MB with 0xB0000 bytes free above the coredump partition)
